title: Wire manager property editor to expanded form contract
description: Expand the manager property editor UI and API mapping to support richer property fields, deterministic field errors, and create/edit UX parity with the backend contract.
acceptance_criteria: Manager property editor supports the enriched field set required by the new backend contract
Field-level validation and submit-state UX are deterministic for create and edit flows
Property detail reflects the enriched form fields after save without breaking session or unauthorized handling
